message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

class "HorizontalMenuRenderer" as HorizontalMenuRenderer <<SuppressWarnings>> {
}
note top of HorizontalMenuRenderer
eapli.framework.presentation.console.menu
end note

class "MenuRenderer" as MenuRenderer {
}
note top of MenuRenderer
eapli.framework.presentation.console.menu
end note

class "VerticalMenuRenderer" as VerticalMenuRenderer <<SuppressWarnings>> {
}
note top of VerticalMenuRenderer
eapli.framework.presentation.console.menu
end note

class "MenuItemRenderer" as MenuItemRenderer <<SuppressWarnings>> {
  {static} MenuItemRenderer DEFAULT
  --
  MenuItemRenderer()
  void render(MenuItem item)
}
note top of MenuItemRenderer
eapli.framework.presentation.console.menu
end note

class "MenuItem" as MenuItem {
}
note top of MenuItem
eapli.framework.actions.menu
end note

HorizontalMenuRenderer ..> MenuItemRenderer : itemRenderer
MenuRenderer --> MenuItemRenderer : itemRenderer
VerticalMenuRenderer ..> MenuItemRenderer : itemRenderer

MenuItemRenderer ..> MenuItem

MenuItemRenderer --> MenuItemRenderer : DEFAULT

@enduml
```
